Kadir Has University Theater Club

The Kadir Has University Theater Club organized its 12th Theater Festival between April 14–20. On the first day of the festival, they staged the premiere of the play “Living with Tight Shoes”, which they had worked on throughout the year, at the Block D Grand Hall.

In the following days of the festival, theater clubs from universities such as Koç University, Medipol University, and Yıldız Technical University performed their own plays on stage.

After the festival, the Kadir Has University Theater Club went on tour with “Living with Tight Shoes”, bringing the play to audiences at Middle East Technical University, Bursa Uludağ University, and Kağıthane Sadabad Stage.
